title: 繋がれリレー！おばけ退治で大団円！

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
The time has come, everyone... Is your blood
pumping? Are your hearts steeled?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Poor, terrified King told me the ghostly ruckus is at an all-time high... BUT that ends today!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Onward, friends! Let's put this ghost to rest! I'm
the princess with a burning heart! And together,
we're the invincible...

text_block_list.name: Ghost Hunting Party
text_block_list.text: Ghost Beatdown Brigade!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I've got eyes on a light... Is anyone nearby?

text_block_list.name: Gallant Disciplinary Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
Affirmative! Squad A is in your perimeter. The
light was most likely just our flashlight. Please
resume your search!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Roger that. The classroom team will keep
searching here for now.

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
This is the third-floor search party! We just heard
a strange noise and are in pursuit!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident B
text_block_list.text: Whoa! ...Let's stay vigilant of anyone running in our vicinity! Over! Hehe, I'm not gonna make that mistake again!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Excellent work! We're gathering information at a
steady pace, just as planned!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Okay, everyone. Let's bring it in for a minute.
We should organize all of our intel at the dorm,
Nature!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...Uh, Nature? Are you okay? You have the same
expression I did when I first tried eating natto.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Oh it's nothing, hehe. It just really hit me right
now, but you sure have changed.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Giving the order to compile our intel, throwing
the tea party earlier... What's up? Did something
happen to you?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Oh, I see what you mean! Pearl was kind
enough to clue me in to something!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
She described the extent of what King did in
order to support me.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Then I realized it! The cheers that moved me to
my core that day... The smiles on everyone's
faces...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It was all the product of King's hard work! She
listened to everyone's concerns and honed herself
into someone we could depend on. All so we
could fight side-by-side!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And that's why... I believe I should stand beside
you all and fight together. I've just been trying to
act with that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
After all, I've already seen that success comes
from everyone working together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...I see motivation wasn't the only thing you
gained from King that day.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All righty. Thanks for the intel, everyone. So
we've seen signs of the ghost in the classrooms,
the hallways, and on the stage.

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
Things have been falling over on their own, and
we've heard screams and unexplainable noises,
right?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: O-o-ohhh... myyy... goodness!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I must have been right near it in every place I
searched! How could I ever hope to catch it when
I didn't even notice it was there?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...Hm, right near it?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Aha! Who's there?! HAVE AT THEEEEE!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash! Tumble, tumble...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
OOOHHH! I know you're there, ghostie! Tremble
in fear at my bellow, and come out with your
hands in the air!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Not here! Not here either! There's no use hiding! I will search every last inch of this place!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it... Hey, Kawakami. What were
you doing when King and I saw the ghost the first
time?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see... That's right. I was helping out
with making a sign...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! I messed up and got covered head to
toe in red paint! I was seriously panicking, and
then I...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Then I... went to the dorm to... take a... shower...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm the ghost?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear plenty of gossip about what happened in
the following days. Kawakami Princess might have
caused a huge fuss, but she also had a major
effect on everyone around her.

text_block_list.name: Schoolbound Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear what happened with the Ritto Dorm
ghost? Turns out there never was a ghost after all!
Thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Ritto Dorm Resident A
text_block_list.text:
No kidding! But I know we'll be okay if something
like that happens again! Kawakami showed us
how important it is to work together. We can do
amazing things as a team!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Kawakami really did great. Everything has
been wrapped up nice and neat. All's well that
en—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second... What about that eerie light we
saw when she crashed through the dorm wall?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: D-don't tell me that was... No way!
